resourcePanelOnboarding_text: All your helpful resources can be found in the resource area. When starting a level it will always show the instructions tab first.
resourcePanelOnboarding_tabsText: There are tabs for each of the resources you need while working on a level including Instructions, Validation and Version History.
resourcePanelOnboarding_linksText: Here is where you'll find links to documentation and lab settings including light/dark and font size.
resourcePanelOnboarding_finishText: The button that allows you to submit or move to the next level can always be found at the bottom of the resource area. It will be disabled if you need to do more work to complete the level.
toSubmitEditRun: To submit, edit and run your code
toSubmitValidate: To submit, your code must meet all goals
versionHistoryLoadFailure: Sorry, we couldn't load your version history. Please try again.
versionLoadFailure: Sorry, we couldn't load that version. Please try again.
